evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 50 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Active, subfoveal choroidal neovascularization (CNV)~* Fibrosis < 50% of total lesion area~* Visual acuity (VA) 20/25-20/320~* Age ≥ 50 yrs~* At least 1 drusen (>63μ) in either eye or late AMD in fellow eye~Exclusion Criteria:~* Previous treatment for CNV in study eye~* Other progressive retinal disease likely to compromise VA~* Contraindications to injections with Lucentis or Avastin"

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: BCVA letter-score change from baseline at week 48-52 — mean difference (MD, continuous scale; non-inferiority primary)
NMA_CONFIG.note: v1.3: ANCHOR (ranibizumab-vs-verteporfin proxy-bridge; fabricated-edge concern) REPLACED by VIEW-1 + VIEW-2 (direct ranibizumab vs aflibercept 2 mg pivotals). HARRIER added (brolucizumab pair to HAWK). k=6. SCALE CHANGED from 'HR-equivalent ratio' to BCVA MD (true continuous measure). Non-inferiority margin −4 letters per regulatory precedent.

title: RapidMeta Ophthalmology | Anti-VEGF Class NMA in Neovascular AMD v1.3
